boundary_policy.compiled: true only when concrete usage targets are recorded
boundary_policy.eligible: observed or extension may compile, but eligibility alone never sets compiled true
boundary_policy.extension: eligible only as a labeled report adaptation when used
boundary_policy.fallback: neutral reversible compiler default, never reference evidence
boundary_policy.observed: eligible for direct deterministic compilation when used
boundary_policy.unknown: retained with compiled false; a needed default is a separate fallback record

fallback_records.basis: VI did not provide a usable signal color; neutral reversible fallback.
VI did not provide a usable accent color; neutral reversible fallback.
VI did not provide a usable panel color; neutral reversible fallback.
VI did not provide a parseable heading size; neutral reversible fallback.
VI hierarchy does not require an exact caption size; neutral reversible fallback.
VI did not provide parseable horizontal canvas spacing; neutral reversible fallback.
Vertical safe area is a reversible runtime-fit fallback.
VI did not provide parseable module gap; neutral reversible fallback.
Unknown VI layout value uses the neutral reversible compiler default.

motion_boundary.enter: generic opacity plus 14px upward reveal over 420ms
motion_boundary.source: TaoHtml shared Runtime and report-task reveal decisions
